description: JSON schemas for all PM input and output message types. All messages include a status field: unread | pending | done.

common_fields.note: Every message includes these fields in addition to its type-specific fields
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following convention in CLAUDE.md e.g. REQ-CLIENT-0001

client_request.description: A request, requirement, or feedback arriving from the client (Marko or external). Appended to pm_inbox.json.

type_specific_fields.request_id: string — same as message_id for requests
type_specific_fields.priority: string — enum: critical | high | normal | low
type_specific_fields.category: string — enum: new_requirement | change_request | feedback | question | approval_confirmation
type_specific_fields.subject: string — one line summary
type_specific_fields.body: string — full description of the request
type_specific_fields.attachments: array of strings — file paths to supporting documents
type_specific_fields.requires_response_by: string — ISO 8601 date or empty string if no deadline

category_notes.new_requirement: Client is requesting a new capability
category_notes.change_request: Client is requesting a change to existing scope
category_notes.feedback: Client is providing feedback, no immediate action required
category_notes.question: Client is asking for information
category_notes.approval_confirmation: Client is confirming approval of something PM submitted for sign-off. PM confirms receipt and updates the relevant state.

example.subject: Add support for snapshot export to OVA format
example.body: Users need to be able to export any snapshot as an OVA file for portability to other hypervisors. This should be accessible from the snapshot management UI.

consolidated_report.description: Daily consolidated operational report from PPM to PM. One per day. Appended to pm_inbox.json.

type_specific_fields.overall_summary: string — two to three sentences maximum
type_specific_fields.completed_since_last_report: array of strings — task IDs completed

role_status_object.role: string — role abbreviation e.g. sd, spm, cr

blocker_object.proposed_resolution: string — or empty string if none

decision_request_object.subject: string
decision_request_object.recommendation: string — PPM recommendation or empty string

metrics_object.coder_queue_depth_avg: number — average tasks waiting per coder

escalation.description: An escalation from any role that cannot be resolved without PM involvement. Appended to pm_inbox.json.

type_specific_fields.category: string — enum: technical_blocker | resource_conflict | scope_dispute | security_finding | quality_failure | external_dependency
type_specific_fields.subject: string
type_specific_fields.description: string — full description of the issue
type_specific_fields.already_attempted: array of strings — what has already been tried
type_specific_fields.recommendation: string — escalating role's recommendation or empty string
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task IDs blocked by this escalation
type_specific_fields.resolved_by: string — decision message_id that resolved this, or empty string

pm_decision.description: A decision made by the PM in response to a decision_request, escalation, or client_request. Written to relevant role outbox.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — message_id of the originating message this resolves
type_specific_fields.decision: string — enum: approved | rejected | deferred | modified
type_specific_fields.rationale: string — full explanation. Mandatory. Never empty.
type_specific_fields.instructions: string — what the recipient must do next. Mandatory. Never empty.
type_specific_fields.affects_roles: array of strings — role abbreviations of other roles that must be notified

client_report.description: A status report produced by PM for the client. Written to pm_to_client.json outbox.

type_specific_fields.period_covered: string — human readable e.g. Week of 2026-03-31
type_specific_fields.executive_summary: string — three to five sentences for non-technical reader
type_specific_fields.progress_this_period: array of strings — what was completed
type_specific_fields.planned_next_period: array of strings — what is planned
type_specific_fields.decisions_required: array of strings — what the client needs to decide

convention_request.description: Written by any agent to the PM inbox when a situation is not covered by CLAUDE.md or the role file. Agent waits for PM decision before proceeding.

type_specific_fields.situation: string — full description of the uncovered situation
type_specific_fields.proposed_convention: string — what convention the agent proposes
type_specific_fields.blocking_task: string — task ID blocked by this gap, or empty string
